title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on social inequality and individual responsibility.

questions.question: Do you think the gap between rich and poor is growing in your society? What do you think are the main consequences?
Do people who are financially successful have a greater responsibility to help those who are less fortunate?

script.text: Do you think the gap between rich and poor is growing in your society? What do you think are the main consequences?
Do people who are financially successful have a greater responsibility to help those who are less fortunate?
Some people argue that a certain level of inequality in society actually motivates people to work harder. To what extent do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
